progress_summary: Tri-agent audit of the coordination-gaps overhaul changeset (44 agents: 3 Auditor sweeps -> adversarial Verifier per finding). 41 raised, 31 confirmed, 10 refuted. Fixed and re-verified this round: GATE-01 (git commit -a / -am / pathspec / 'git add -A &&' all defeated the tree binding — write-tree hashes the index BEFORE the command stages; now computes the prospective tree in a scratch index), GATE-01b (--no-verify matched inside quoted commit messages -> failed OPEN), GATE-03 (uncaught throw -> empty stdout -> ALLOW; now a top-level handler denies), GATE-04 (git -C / sh -c undetected), GATE-05 (missing updated_at disabled the freshness backstop), OC-01/MIRROR-01 (mirror shipped neither plugins/ nor marketplace.json, and the source path resolved to a nonexistent dir — the plugin was undeliverable), OC-04 (test harness asserted against live repo state; now hermetic, 28/28), SESSION-01 (checkpoint text injected into model context unescaped), OC-05 (shared orchestrator.md kept the retracted auto-invoke claims and is bundled into all 29 skills). Every gate fix has a regression test and an independent out-of-band reproduction.
next_actions: Triage the ~20 remaining MEDIUM/LOW findings from this audit (none block; see workflow journal).
Pre-existing and NOT from this changeset: 14 critical / 41 high from the 2026-07-04 portability audit are still open — that loop predates this work and remains open.
Wire `test:gate` into package.json + CI so the gate suite runs on every PR.

skill_state.grade: B (changeset); repo-wide grade F from the 2026-07-04 portability audit is UNCHANGED and still open
skill_state.note: loop_state stays 'open': this round fixed the changeset's own defects, but the pre-existing 157-finding portability audit (14 critical / 41 high, 2 fixed) has never been closed. Marking this checkpoint 'complete' would repeat exactly the defect the overhaul's P3 exists to prevent.
